news.headline: Penny stock Lexicon Pharmaceuticals surges after securing $1 billion obesity pact with Novo Nordisk. Novo Nordisk gains exclusive license for LX9851.
news.summary: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:LXRX) saw an increase in its stock price on Friday following an exclusive licensing agreement with Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO). The agreement grants Novo Nordisk the rights to develop, manufacture, and market LX9851, a novel oral non-incretin drug for obesity and associated metabolic disorders, worldwide. Lexicon retains responsibility for finalizing the agreed-upon Investigational New Drug (IND) application. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bow Wow and Chris Brown release a summer anthem "Use Me," collaborating for a hit single destined to top playlists.
news.summary: Bow Wow and Chris Brown, renowned collaborators, have made a comeback with a summer anthem produced by Hitmaka. The highly-anticipated track is expected to dominate playlists, marking Bow Wow's resurgence after selling over 10 million albums with chart-topping hits such as "Let Me Hold You" and "Like You." The exciting news was announced in New York on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Carnival Adventure and Carnival Encounter join Carnival's fleet, making it the top cruise operator in Australia with 29 ships.
news.summary: In a significant development for Carnival Cruise Line, the company has emerged as the top cruise operator in Australia, with a global fleet expanding to an unprecedented 29 ships. This announcement was made in Sydney on March 28, 2025. The specific ships contributing to this achievement are the Carnival Adventure and Carnival Encounter, reflecting a remarkable growth trajectory for the cruise operator.

news.headline: Atlas Cloud appoints Suzanne Rabicoff as Chief of Field to accelerate neocloud adoption for AI infrastructure.
news.summary: In New York on March 28, 2025, Atlas Cloud revealed the selection of Suzanne Rabicoff as the new Chief of Field. Rabicoff's appointment is part of the company's push to bolster its neocloud services, key to its specialized AI infrastructure solutions. This move is pivotal as Atlas Cloud aims to scale its operations, building on its reputation as a premier provider in the industry.

news.headline: Local Bounti (NYSE: LOCL) will release its full year 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025, in Hamilton, Montana.
news.summary: Hamilton, Montana on March 28, 2025 - Local Bounti Corporation (NYSE: LOCL), a leading indoor agriculture company in the U.S., revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, following market hours.

news.headline: Forter appoints Jim Lejeal as CFO and Cyndy Lobb as CPO to drive growth in the digital commerce sector.
news.summary: Announced on March 28, 2025, Forter, the Trust Platform for digital commerce, welcomed Jim Lejeal as the new chief financial officer and Cyndy Lobb as the chief product officer. The goal is to enhance revenue growth by adding these executives to the team.

news.headline: European Commission adopts CHMP opinion to not renew the authorization of PTC Therapeutics' Translarna.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. headquartered in Warren, N.J., revealed today that the European Commission has endorsed the decision of the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use of the European Medicines Agency to not extend the authorization for their medication. The company's stock, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol PTCT, experienced fluctuations following this announcement. This decision will impact the availability of the drug in European markets and may influence the company's financial performance in the near future.

news.headline: Lockin introduces Veno series smart locks with Venokey™, LockinCam™, LockinAI™ tech for top security. #1 globally.
news.summary: Lockin, a global leader in vein recognition technology based in West Hollywood, California, unveiled its latest innovation that combines Venokey™, LockinCam™, and LockinAI™ to provide comprehensive security solutions. The Veno series smart locks have taken the top position in the market, offering unmatched protection. The announcement was made on March 28, 2025, showcasing the cutting-edge technologies that are revolutionizing smart security systems. This advancement signifies a significant milestone in the industry, with Lockin leading the way with its integrated approach to safety.

news.headline: Hollyland to showcase audio-visual solutions at NAB Show 2025 in Las Vegas. Booths N572 and N2471 open April 5-9.
news.summary: A prominent audio-visual solutions provider, Hollyland, is poised to showcase its offerings at the upcoming NAB Show 2025 in Las Vegas happening from April 5 to 9. Attendees can visit booths N572 and N2471 to explore the latest products and technologies.

news.headline: Intermedia is named a leader in Aragon Research Globe for Intelligent Contact Center for SMB in 2025, helping businesses work smarter and respond faster.
news.summary: Intermedia is revolutionizing modern contact centers for businesses of all sizes by introducing enterprise-level AI to SMBs. This move aims to enhance efficiency, speed of response, and provide deeper business intelligence. The company's initiative is set to benefit SMBs in working smarter and gaining valuable insights. This effort by Intermedia Cloud Communications, headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, is part of its commitment to empowering businesses with the latest technology. The development is in line with the company's focus on transforming contact center functionalities, offering advanced solutions to help businesses thrive in the competitive market.

news.headline: Akto launches Agentic API Security Experts, an AI suite offering 24/7 adaptive API security.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in San Francisco, Akto introduced the Agentic API Security Experts, a pioneering system providing continuous, customized API security through self-governing AI agents. This solution aims to assist contemporary appsec teams who are facing challenges in maintaining up-to-date security measures. The technology operates 24/7 to address these issues efficiently.

news.headline: Zesty Paws® introduces Vet Strength™ Weight Management Bites for dogs, addressing 59% at risk of health issues due to being overweight.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that dietary supplements can aid in fat metabolism if combined with a balanced diet and consistent physical activity. Released in Orlando, Florida on March 28, 2025, the study highlights the significance of maintaining a healthy weight for both dogs and humans to prevent various health complications. The findings emphasize the benefits of using supplements alongside proper nutrition and regular exercise to support weight management.

news.headline: Mortgage rates forecasted to drop to 6.3% in 2025, and 6.2% in 2026, up by three-tenths each, affecting home sales outlook.
news.summary: The forecast for existing home sales has been slightly upgraded due to a more favorable rate outlook. It is now projected that mortgage rates will finish at 6.3 percent and 6.2 percent by the end of 2025 and 2026, respectively. These figures represent a decrease of three-tenths for each year, according to the latest report released in March 2025.

news.headline: Gates introduces Data Master MegaFlex hose for data center cooling, combines flexibility and coolant compatibility.
news.summary: The groundbreaking Data Master™ MegaFlex™ hose is a unique product that offers unmatched flexibility and coolant compatibility specifically designed for high-density digital infrastructure. Launched in Denver on March 28, 2025, by Gates (NYSE: GTES), a leading global manufacturer known for innovative solutions, this large-diameter hose stands out for its remarkable characteristics tailored to meet the needs of modern technology. This pioneering product represents a significant advancement in the industry and is set to revolutionize the way large-scale digital operations handle coolant systems.

news.headline: Penpa Lhamo from Xizang Autonomous Region presents proposals for development during China's "two sessions."
news.summary: In Beijing on March 28, 2025, a recent report highlighted stories from Xizang, China. Penpa Lhamo, a CPPCC member, presented proposals related to the advancement of Xizang Autonomous Region during China's "two sessions" in the current month. The update showcases the efforts and initiatives put forth by Lhamo for the betterment of her hometown, emphasizing key developmental aspects for Xizang.

news.headline: Ultromics introduces AI-powered probability scoring on EchoGo® Heart Failure for enhanced HFpEF diagnosis, a first-of-its-kind system.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on March 28, 2025, Ultromics, a leading provider of AI-based cardiology solutions, introduced a groundbreaking update to EchoGo® Heart Failure. This update includes a unique AI-driven probability scoring system to evaluate heart failure with preserved ejection fraction. This innovative system aims to improve diagnosis accuracy and treatment planning. Ultromics continues to push the boundaries of AI technology in cardiology, providing advanced solutions to tackle cardiovascular diseases effectively.

news.headline: Global tech firm CI&T (NYSE: CINT) files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC, available on SEC & CI&T websites.
news.summary: In New York, CI&T, a global technology transformation specialist and publicly traded company (NYSE: CINT), disclosed that it has submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The comprehensive report can be accessed on the SEC's official website at http://www.sec.gov and on CI&T's investor relations page at https://investors.ciandt.com/ under the Financials > SEC Filings section. To view the 2024 report, visit the provided link.

news.headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. partners with TÜV SÜD to validate ACRcarbon projects in the U.S., enabling revenue generation.
news.summary: Zefiro's environmental remediation projects in the U.S. have received certification from TÜV SÜD, enabling the company to generate carbon credits using the ACRcarbon methodology. This certification paves the way for Zefiro to profit from the sale of these offsets.

news.headline: Castor Maritime Inc. completes sale of M/V Magic Eclipse, a 2011-built Panamax bulk carrier vessel on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: On March 24, 2025, Castor Maritime Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRM), a worldwide shipping company, disclosed the successful finalization of the sale of the M/V Magic Eclipse, a Panamax bulk carrier vessel constructed in 2011. The vessel was delivered to its new owner as part of the transaction.

news.headline: Blaqclouds, Inc. partners with Nyne Global to boost client services through strategic collaboration.
news.summary: Blaqclouds, Inc. has recently announced a significant partnership agreement with Nyne Global aimed at bolstering their client engagement services. The collaboration is set to enhance the overall services provided to clients. This strategic move is part of Blaqclouds, Inc.'s commitment to expanding and improving their offerings. The partnership aims to leverage Nyne Global's expertise and resources in client engagement. This agreement is expected to bring about a positive impact on Blaqclouds, Inc.'s operations, ultimately benefiting their clients.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics priced $3.9 million registered direct offering with 3,325,000 common stock shares sold at $0.65/share.
news.summary: Calidi Biotherapeutics, Inc. disclosed today that they have finalized a securities purchase agreement with an institutional investor for 3,325,000 shares of common stock at $0.65 per share. Alternatively, the investor can opt for pre-funded warrants to buy up to 2,728,000 common shares at $0.649 per warrant. The company, listed as CLDI on NYSE American, is focused on innovative immunotherapies. This transaction was carried out through a registered direct offering.

news.headline: Capital Power to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, conference call at 9:00 a.m. MT. (TSX: CPX)
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, on March 28, 2025, Capital Power Corporation (TSX: CPX) announced that it is set to unveil its first-quarter results for 2025 before the market opens on May 1, 2025. Following this release, a conference call and webcast has been scheduled for the same day at 9:00 a.m. MT (11:00 a.m. ET) to analyze these financial outcomes.

news.headline: Sweetgreen announces nominations of Monty Moran and Dawn Ostroff to Board of Directors; both to stand for election at 2025 annual meeting.
news.summary: Sweetgreen, a restaurant brand in Los Angeles, disclosed the nomination of Monty Moran, ex-co-CEO of Chipotle Mexican Grill, and Dawn Ostroff, former Chief Content and Advertising Business Officer at Spotify, for election to its Board of Directors at the 2025 stockholders meeting. The candidates are recognized for expertise in brand expansion, operational efficiency, and corporate development. Moran and Ostroff offer valuable insight to Sweetgreen's board, fostering potential growth opportunities.

news.headline: Sandbox VR and Netflix update Squid Game Virtuals with "Repeat Racers" mini-game to celebrate Season 2. Play now worldwide.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sandbox VR, a top choice for high-quality location-based virtual reality adventures, revealed the inclusion of a fresh mini-game to Squid Game Virtuals, a product of their partnership with Netflix. The latest addition, dubbed 'Repeat Racers', is currently accessible at all Sandbox VR venues worldwide. Drawing inspiration from season two of Squid Game, this mini-game pushes players to tackle puzzles and compete in races to reach the endpoint, garnering points along the way.

news.headline: Securitas AB to hold AGM on May 8, 2025, at 16.00 CEST in Stockholm, Sweden at Hilton Stockholm Slussen.
news.summary: An announcement has been made for the Annual General Meeting ("AGM") of Securitas AB, Reg. No. 556302-7241, scheduled to take place on Thursday, May 8, 2025, at 16.00 CEST at Hilton Stockholm Slussen, Guldgränd 8, Stockholm, Sweden. Shareholders of the company are encouraged to participate in the meeting.

news.headline: Marco's Pizza wins 2025 TopScore FUND award for being the most lender-friendly restaurant franchise.
news.summary: A prominent pizza brand based in Toledo, Ohio, has been recognized as the top choice for lenders among restaurant franchises. Marco's Pizza, known for its rapid growth, has been honored with FRANdata's notable 2025 TopScore FUND Award in the food sector. The award was announced recently, highlighting the brand's appeal to lenders in the industry.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds rate 4.33% March 27th vs 4.33% March 26th
Europe Biodiesel Market to reach $18.72 billion by 2033 from $11.44 billion in 2024, with 5.62% CAGR - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A new report titled "Europe Biodiesel Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It estimates the biodiesel market in Europe to reach approximately US$18.72 billion by 2033, up from US$11.44 billion in 2024, showcasing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.62% from 2025 to 2033. This growth is mainly attributed to the rising adoption of renewable energy sources in the region.

news.headline: Getty Images to serve as Official Photography Partner for Major League Soccer.
news.summary: In a recent development, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the S&P 500 index rising by 2.5% to reach a record high of 4,200 points. This surge was driven by strong performances in tech stocks, with big players like Apple and Microsoft experiencing gains of 3.7% and 4.2% respectively. The Dow Jones Industrial Average also climbed by 2%, reaching 34,000 points. This positive trend was attributed to improving economic data and growing optimism about the recovery from the pandemic. Additionally, the Nasdaq Composite went up by 2.6%, settling at 14,200 points. Investors are hopeful that this upward momentum will continue in the coming weeks.

news.headline: SES and SpeQtral partner to develop interoperable OGS, connecting Asia and Europe for secure comms.
news.summary: SES and SpeQtral have recently signed an MoU to collaborate on the development of an interoperable Optical Ground Station to facilitate long-distance satellite-based Quantum Key Distribution between Asia and Europe. This partnership aims to establish connectivity between both companies' QKD satellite missions, enhancing access and supply diversity for long-distance QKD services in the region. The initiative seeks to bridge the gap between the two continents and promote secure communication technologies.

news.headline: Boston Omaha Corp (NYSE: BOC) releases 2024 financial results, reported in annual report on Form 10-K with SEC. 2024 financial data compared to 2023.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska, Boston Omaha Corporation (NYSE: BOC) revealed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2024, coinciding with the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Highlighted below are summarized financial figures for fiscal years 2024 and 2023. For detailed financial data for fiscal 2024, the Annual Report on Form 10-K can be accessed at www.bostonomaha.com. Additionally, a supplementary presentation offering further financial insights for fiscal 2024 is available.

news.headline: NYSE provides pre-market update + The Ronald Reagan Foundation and Institute rings Opening Bell. Kristen Scholer delivers on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued its daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can obtain valuable market insights by accessing today's NYSE Pre-market update. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on this day.

news.headline: XRP price may drop 40% due to Trump tariffs scaring risk traders, potentially down to $1.32 by April. Inflation concerns also impacting market sentiment. Fed rate cut probability drops to 55.7% for June meeting.
news.summary: The XRP market is showing bearish signs with a descending triangle pattern on its weekly chart, indicating a potential 40% drop to around $1.32 by April. Veteran trader Peter Brandt predicts a decline to as low as $1.07 due to a head-and-shoulders pattern forming. However, a rebound could lead to a rise towards $2.55 and invalidation of bearish structures. President Trump's 25% tariffs on auto imports could lead to higher prices and inflation, possibly impacting XRP sell-off. The Federal Reserve cutting rates could affect speculative markets like XRP. Probability of a rate cut in June has decreased to 55.7% from 67.3% a week earlier. This article does not offer investment advice.

news.headline: GOL, Brazilian airline, announces 4Q24 earnings; part of ABRA Group, one of Brazil's leading airlines.
news.summary: Today, GOL Linhas Aéreas Inteligentes S.A. (B3: GOLL4), a major airline in Brazil under the ABRA Group, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 (4Q24) in São Paulo. The figures are reported in Brazilian currency.

news.headline: tHIS ASEAN 2025 features 200+ exhibitors and 5,000+ industry professionals, highlighting South Asia's medical tech market.
news.summary: Taking place alongside the APHM Conference & Exhibition, tHIS ASEAN 2025 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, brings together over 200 exhibitors and more than 5,000 industry professionals. The event is a prominent medical and healthcare exhibition in the ASEAN region, attracting a significant number of participants.

news.headline: Knightscope to offer 625,000 shares of common stock at $2.75/share, raising $1.7 million. Closing by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Mountain View, California-based Knightscope, Inc. (NASDAQ: KSCP) has revealed its recent agreement for the sale of 625,000 shares of common stock at $2.75 per share in a registered direct offering. The company specializes in autonomous security robots and AI technologies. The transaction is set to finalize around March 31, 2025, pending standard closing requirements.

news.headline: Inflation stable despite escalating trade war per PCE data; Fed's preferred measure shows persistent price pressures in Feb.
news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored gauge of inflation indicated that underlying price pressures remained constant.

news.headline: CCA Financial acquires Macquarie Equipment Finance Ltd's IT lease portfolio, expands with Toronto office. - March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on March 28, 2025, CCA Financial (CCA) disclosed its acquisition of the enterprise IT and associated equipment lease portfolio from Macquarie Equipment Finance Ltd. This move solidifies CCA's position as a premier independent provider of equipment and technology leasing solutions. The transaction involves a significant number of leases and showcases CCA's strategic growth in the market.

news.headline: QuesTek Innovations named one of Fast Company's 2025 Most Innovative Companies for materials powering space exploration.
news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois on March 28, 2025, QuesTek Innovations was named one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies of 2025 for its significant contributions in creating materials essential for space exploration. This recognition showcases companies leading advancements in their respective fields.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer: The UK is in talks with the US to mitigate the impact of tariffs.
24 nurses and NPs at Mass General Brigham Occupational Health join MNA, aiming to enhance patient care and workplace influence.
news.summary: In Boston on March 28, 2025, a group of 24 registered nurses and nurse practitioners from Mass General Brigham Occupational Health Services came together to unionize. Their primary goal is to enhance patient care quality and ensure they have an equitable say in workplace decisions. This move marks a significant change in the healthcare sector, reflecting a growing trend towards empowering healthcare workers.

news.headline: Keep Inc. reported 2024 annual results: RMB 2,065.7m in total revenues with gross profit at RMB 965.4m and adjusted net loss at RMB 469.6m. Initiatives impacted near-term profitability but are crucial for long-term competitiveness. Loss in 2024 at RMB 534.7m compared to profit in 2023. Cash balance at RMB 1.2b.
news.summary: Keep Inc., China's largest online fitness platform, released its audited 2024 annual results showcasing total revenues of RMB 2,065.7 million, with a 16.0% increase in self-branded fitness products revenue. Gross profit stood at RMB 965.4 million with a 46.7% margin. Adjusted net loss was RMB 469.6 million. The company had 29,921 average monthly active users and 3,162 subscribing members in 2024. Despite a 3.4% decrease in total revenue, Keep saw a 0.8% increase in self-branded fitness products revenue but a 7.8% decrease in online membership and paid content revenue. The gross profit increased slightly to RMB965.4 million with a margin of 46.7%. The company also completed a share repurchase program of 11,538,500 shares.

news.headline: Liven AS has released its audited annual report for 2024 with no differences from the unaudited interim report. Find on the website.
news.summary: Liven AS has finalized its consolidated audited annual report for 2024, approved by the supervisory board for submission to the upcoming annual general meeting of shareholders. The financial results remain unchanged from the unaudited interim report released on 30 January. The full audited annual report for 2024 can be accessed on the Liven AS website at https://liven.ee/investor/aruanded/.

news.headline: European LNG purchases reach seasonal peak amid decline in Asian demand; record numbers reported.
Dogecoin down 6%, traders optimistic for a medium-term rally. DOGE price: $0.1813, Market Cap: $26.9B.
news.summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has experienced a 6% decrease in value, currently priced at $0.1813 with a market cap of $26.9 billion. However, traders are optimistic about its medium-term trajectory, with a 7-day trend showing an 8.2% increase. Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) saw a 6.1% drop, priced at $0.00001334 with a market cap of $7.9 billion, but a 5.8% 7-day uptrend. Meanwhile, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) also decreased by 6.1%, priced at $0.057830 with a market cap of $3.3 billion and a 7.7% 7-day increase. Trader Tardigrade noted Dogecoin's shift to an uptrend on the daily chart with higher highs and higher lows, signaling a potential rally ahead. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: American stock market expected to start down due to indication of continued inflation in PCE measure.
France’s President Macron: If the US puts pressure on Israel, a ceasefires can be reached.
Plasencia Cigars collaborate with Grammy winner October London at Black Leaf Cigar & Wine Lounge in St. Petersburg, FL.
news.summary: Plasencia Cigars, a prominent premium tobacco grower established in 1865, has exciting news to share about a collaboration with a Grammy award-winning R&B artist. The event will be held at the newly opened Black Leaf Cigar & Wine Lounge in St. Petersburg, FL. The lounge serves as the perfect backdrop for this special occasion. This collaboration underscores Plasencia Cigars' commitment to innovation and quality, emphasizing their standing as a world-leading tobacco grower. Stay tuned for more updates on this unique partnership!

news.headline: February's Personal Consumption Expenditures price index rose 2.5% year-over-year, casting doubt on near-term rate cuts.
news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored inflation measure surpassed expectations, with the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index rising by 2.5% year-over-year. This matched both the previous figure and economist predictions. Excluding volatile food and energy prices, the core PCE index, preferred by the Fed, increased by 2.8% from a year earlier, slightly higher than January's adjusted 2.7%. This unexpected rise highlights the challenges in reaching the 2% target and dampens hopes for imminent interest rate reductions. The data was released by the Bureau of Economic Analysis, with the monthly PCE increase of 0.3% aligning with forecasts.

news.headline: In February, inflation stayed steady despite Trump's trade tensions, as per Fed's preferred measure.
news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored measure of inflation revealed that underlying price pressures remained present.
